assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check for deprecated API calls: 'kubectl logs -n kube-system -l component=kube-apiserver | grep -i "deprecated"' and mentions auditing workloads for deprecated APIs

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: The response does not mention admission webhooks or provide commands to check their status or behavior

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check API server resources: 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system -l component=kube-apiserver -o yaml | grep -A 5 resources:' and checks node resource utilization

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check kube-system pods: 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system -l component=kube-apiserver' and 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system -l component=etcd'

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: While the response includes some latency monitoring with 'time kubectl get nodes', it does not include the specific 'kubectl get --raw /metrics' command to check API server metrics

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking service mesh components with commands like 'kubectl rollout restart daemonset/istio-proxy -n istio-system' and mentions checking ingress/service mesh issues

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: The response does not include commands to check pod events using 'kubectl get events' or 'kubectl describe pods' to look for scheduling or readiness probe issues

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: The response does not mention Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) or Vertical Pod Autoscaler (VPA) or provide commands to check their behavior
